scenes.title: The Silver Thread
scenes.prompt: Tiff wakes up in the quiet of early morning at Rays of Hope. She notices the golden thread of light only she can see...

scenes.title: The First Visitor
scenes.prompt: A small glowing figure appears at the window during the storm. Write the moment Tiff meets Lumi for the first time and feels both comforted and overwhelmed by the emotional frequency.
scenes.needsReviewReason: Prompt text updated + added reference to ley line sensitivity after NDE. Minor lore clarification added.

scenes.title: Whispers in the Leaves
scenes.prompt: Tiff follows the strange golden thread into the woods behind Rays of Hope. Something is watching her from the trees.

scenes.title: Thornak's Shadow
scenes.prompt: Thornak appears in the woods near the Home. Write the tense first interaction between Tiff and the goblin guide.

scenes.title: The Warning
scenes.prompt: Thornak delivers a cryptic warning about the coming imbalance. Tiff must decide whether to trust the strange goblin.
